releaseNotes:
Fix M3U import reliability + Apple TV UI redesign

- Harden playlist import: VLC User-Agent, uncapped body size, content
  validation (HTML/JSON/empty detection), Xtream auth check, and clear
  user-facing error messages instead of vague network failures.
- Surface imported channel count and rich success/error feedback in the
  Add Playlist screen; roll back ghost playlist rows on failure.
- Apple TV-style theme tokens (palette, pill radii, focus colors) and
  focus treatment (lift/glow, bright fill) across RemoteFocusable,
  FocusableButton, and TextField.
- Replace the tab bar with a custom Apple TV top menu that makes focus
  obvious while navigating.

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>
